name: Vision
description:
Hyperion repeater pistols use reverse recoil: keep firing and the gun steadies, boosting accuracy over time. The accuracy shown on the card reflects the fully stabilised state.

The Vision uses a Hyperion pistol barrel, granting higher accuracy, reduced recoil and a 33 percent critical hit damage bonus. In exchange, it tends to have a smaller magazine and lower base damage than other Hyperion pistols.
notes:
In The Pre-Sequel, the Vision often appears with Hyperion's newer material sets and prefixes similar to those seen in Borderlands 2.

A related Pre-Sequel variant called the Factualizer is produced by the older Hyperion.

The Vision only appears at green rarity or above and is a random world drop from any appropriate loot source.
